query_title: Tabu: A Story of the South Seas

recommendations.title: Sunrise: A Song of Two Humans
recommendations.overview: A married farmer falls under the spell of a slatternly woman from the city, who tries to convince him to drown his wife.

recommendations.title: Nosferatu
recommendations.overview: The mysterious Count Orlok summons a happily married real estate agent to his castle, located up in the Transylvanian mountains, to finalise a terrifying deal.

recommendations.title: The Last Laugh
recommendations.overview: An aging doorman, after being fired from his prestigious job at a luxurious hotel, is forced to face the scorn of his friends, neighbours and society.

recommendations.title: Faust
recommendations.overview: God and Satan wager on the soul of a learned and prayerful alchemist as part of their eternal war over Earth.

recommendations.title: City Girl
recommendations.overview: A waitress from Chicago falls in love with a man from rural Minnesota and marries him, with the intent of living a better life - but life on the farm has its own challenges.

recommendations.title: Shadow of the Vampire
recommendations.overview: Director F.W. Murnau makes a Faustian pact with a vampire to get him to star in his 1922 film "Nosferatu."

recommendations.title: Pocahontas
recommendations.overview: Pocahontas, daughter of a Native American tribe chief, falls in love with an English soldier as colonists invade 17th century Virginia.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: Samsara
recommendations.overview: A love story situated in the Himalayas. A Buddhist monk can't choose between life and the way of the Buddha.
